hardCodedRules: Lumen OS, website, Vault, and ChatGPT/OpenAI bridge are connected access channels.
Website-only Lumen users must remain supported.
OpenAI is bridge/adaptor, not final authority.
Long-term direction is Lumen-native replacement where feasible.
Vault connects OS, website, ChatGPT bridge, and future native AI continuity.
status: Added governance, trust, evidence, dependency, provenance, policy, guardian, and Lumen universal connection layers
